description: Sugama vs Krook collision comparison at CBC, n_kx=128

sugama_kinetic_e.note: Killed — implicit NumPy at n_kx=128 too slow (est 14hr). Prior result with Krook+kinetic_e: chi_gB=1.30.

conclusion: Sugama and Krook give identical chi_gB=1.95 at nu=0.01 (low collisionality). The collision model only matters at higher collisionality. The kinetic electron effect (1.95→1.30) is much larger than the collision model effect.
